name: vugg-canary
description: Nightly deterministic regression sweep for vugg-simulator — turns 'I happened to check' into 'nothing regresses unseen'.

scripts.test: node test/diff.test.mjs && node test/promote.test.mjs && node test/repo-meta.test.mjs && node test/status.test.mjs && node test/creep.test.mjs

comment: No dependencies by design: the sweep dynamically imports the TARGET repo's tools/_harness.mjs, which resolves jsdom + dist/ from the target's own node_modules. The canary is pure Node built-ins + git.
